reviews.comment:
Los baños impecables y los playeros muy cordiales para atender

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were spotless and the beach attendants were very friendly and helpful.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención en la playa de servicios. Falta un poco de calidad en el Café y restó.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the beach resort. The café and restaurant could use a bit more quality.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLaGVfc25BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy sucio el lugar, buena onda de los empleados, NO CUMPLEN CON PROTOCOLO de distanciamiento social, dentro del FULL, dejan entrar a toda la gente que se pueda, con tal de vender

(Translated by Google)
The place is very dirty, the employees are friendly, but they DO NOT COMPLY with social distancing protocols. Inside the store, they let in as many people as possible, just to make sales.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLNk8yMTRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Me avergüenzo como socio que tengan una estación así.los baños dan asco y además escaso personal para cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. As a member, I'm ashamed they have a station like this. The bathrooms are disgusting, and there's also a shortage of staff to fill up the gas.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación de servicio!!!! Tiene lugar para poder estacionar casas rodantes, tiene una playa muy amplia, muy limpios los baños, excelente atención

(Translated by Google)
Excellent gas station! It has space for RVs, a very large forecourt, very clean restrooms, and excellent service.
